rationale: Producing the cost tables requires reading design-span raw candles and computing per-pair x session spread statistics via the M15 aggregation code, which does not exist yet (gate-5 code-only implementation deliverable). This gate is metadata-only and does not read raw data or run derivations, so Option A (produce tables now) is not admissible here. No ambiguity: the tables are produced by the implementation PR from DESIGN-span data only, human-approved before any gate-7 execution authorisation.

statistics.p95_session_spread: mandatory diagnostic (PR #430 T-7); reported, not a gate

stress_forms: p90 session spread substituted for median
must_produce_before_gate7_authorisation.pip_conversion_policy: spreads measured in price units; converted via pip_size_for (0.01 iff *_JPY else 0.0001); value-pinned JPY/non-JPY tests apply to the spread path
must_produce_before_gate7_authorisation.data_source_restriction: DESIGN span only (2025-04-25..2026-02-28); never validation/holdout; frozen and committed as metadata
must_produce_before_gate7_authorisation.claim_scope: quote-cost-validity research claim; NOT a live-fill claim
